MSBStatsData 0.1.0
  • Reference

Exam points and study time

exam_study_time.Rd

Study days and exam points of five participants.

Usage

exam_study_time

Format

A tibble with 5 rows and 3 variables:

study_days

Study time in days.

points

Achieved points.

max_points

Maximum achievable points.

On this page
